query: SELECT 'media_catalogue' as tbl, id, title, category, description FROM media_catalogue WHERE title LIKE '%Khanh%' OR title LIKE '%Node 018%' OR title LIKE '%018%' OR description LIKE '%Khanh%' OR description LIKE '%018%';
